title: NBT Items
description: Makes items with extra NBT data display uniquely
body:
# NBT Items **NBT Items** adds custom textures and models for items with stored NBT data. Use **Ctrl + Pick block** on a block to get its stored data. Requires [OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/downloads), [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/) or [Chime](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime). ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j0dqds5c/images/945e2509e5c3ee3ad66671243a113cf08b7c227f.gif)
Feature list
- Signs - Hanging Signs - Barrel - Bee Nest - Bee Hive - Blast Furnace - Brewing Stand - Campfire - Command Block (including Chain and Repeat) - Comparator - Daylight Sensor - Furnace - Jukebox - Smoker - Soul Campfire - Structure Block - Bell - Dispenser - Dropper - Hopper - Chest - Trapped Chest - Shulker Box - Ender Chest - Beacon - Lectern - Enchanting Table - Chiselled Bookshelf - Jigsaw - Bed - Conduit - Sculk Sensor - Sculk Shrieker - Sculk Catalyst - Spawner - Suspicious Sand
Terms of usage
If you use or feature this resourcepack through any medium (PMC, YouTube, Curseforge, etc.), you must credit me and link to this page and/or my profile. If you would like to use this in your public resourcepack, please ask me first, and include credit and a link to this page both in a credits.txt in the resourcepack file and in the description. Usage must be a modification or addition to your pack, not a repost. If you see anyone using my content without permission, please let me know so I can sort it out :)
